scripts.dev: bun run --cwd backend dev & bun run --cwd frontend dev
scripts.build: bun run --cwd backend build && bun run --cwd frontend build
scripts.docker:build: docker build -t multi-agent-harness/backend:latest ./backend & docker build -t multi-agent-harness/frontend:latest ./frontend & docker build -f agents/base/Dockerfile.base -t multi-agent-harness/agent-base:latest . && wait && docker build -f agents/pi/Dockerfile -t multi-agent-harness/agent-pi:latest . & docker build -f agents/copilot/Dockerfile -t multi-agent-harness/agent-copilot:latest . & wait
